source_pr.title: executor: correct the unsigned pk's behavior.
source_pr.body:
Currently for unsigned pk, (MaxInt64, MaxUint64] is stored before [0, MaxInt64].
So the result will be wrong such as `select * from t order by pk`.
This pr is to fix the behavior.
PTAL @coocood @hanfei1991 @lamxTyler

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by id").Check(testkit.Rows("1", "2", "9223372036854775810", "9223372036854775812")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by id").Check(testkit.Rows("1", "2", "9223372036854775810", "9223372036854775812")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR fixes correctness for unsigned primary key ordering in distsql/table reader (so `ORDER BY pk` returns the correct order) and updates related tests. The patch is a deterministic behavior/correctness fix rather than a targeted stabilization for an intermittent flaky failure, so we conservatively classify it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from t order by id").Check(testkit.Rows("1", "2", "9223372036854775810", "9223372036854775812")) (executor/executor_test.go)
